payload.chosen_approach: the answer this research reached (may be 'do not build X')
payload.rationale: in terms of THIS codebase and its constraints

signal_reason:
DECISION IS THE DELIVERABLE — this task was created to reach a direction, not to be specified. It does not proceed to refine on its own; the human disposes it.

RECOMMENDED DISPOSITION (pick one):
  - close: the answer above is the deliverable; nothing to build
  - spawn independent work then close: file the follow-up task(s) below as backlog
  - continue: specify and build this as one task

FOLLOW-UP WORK (only if recommending 'spawn'; a finding is not a task):
  1. <title> — <issue-quality description>

RECOMMENDATION: <which disposition, and why — enough for a one-message answer>
notes: decision recorded; research deliverable parked for human disposition
